title: Baby 5's Heart Breaks
description: Pages 4–8 focus on baby 5's heart breaks, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as sai's battle, Baby 5's crisis, and the collapse of old loyalties shift another part of Dressrosa away from Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fated final showdown! A white-hot battle to the death!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Do you need a hand there, pirate Hunter?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: My King Punch is my family's treasure, its heirloom sword. Granted, I can only shoot it off once per hour.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Have you figured out this stone man's powers?

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: I'm an old companion of King Riku's! This is my friend's country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Is that so... well, I appreciate you coming all the way out here but I'm gonna be the one to bring this guy down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You should hang onto that sword of yours. We still have no idea what's going to happen.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That Boulder bastard's definitely after some- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: There it is! The "Back pain stance!"

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: He's beating 5-billion- bounty Don Chinjao to a Pulp!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: As I have grown older, I have learnt all the more of pain! And I have grown ever deadlier!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Were you even listening, Gramps!? I ain't gonna marry her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: What the hell sort of Harebrained idea is that!? Like I'd get married!

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: Sai! My daughter, Uholishia, leader of the Nihou Navy, is your fiancee!

dialogue.speaker: Baby 5
dialogue.text: I know! I don't care who my wife is!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Go ahead and add together the nihou and Happou Davies and get a Juppou navy with our marriages! I couldn't care less!"

dialogue.speaker: Lao G
dialogue.text: Oh no... LAO G is being ignored!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: He didn't hear a single word!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: But wait! He's still getting mad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Look! An aura of anger is coming out of his head...

dialogue.speaker: Lao G
dialogue.text: Wait, is that his life- force!? Lao G- Sama!

summary: Baby 5's Heart Breaks advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Doflamingo Family, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
